ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the album in HH:MM:SS format */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "music_sales_millions" REAL /* Music recording sales in millions */,
  "claimed_sales_millions" REAL /* Claimed sales in millions */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Official release date of the album */,
  "soundtrack" TEXT /* Indicates if the album is a soundtrack (Y/N) */,
  "friends_rating" REAL /* Rating given by friends, on a scale of 1-10 */,
  "album_cover_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover image */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer who worked on the album */,
  "recording_studio" TEXT /* Name of the recording studio where the album was recorded */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the album has received (e.g., Gold, Platinum) */,
  "lyricist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary lyricist for the album */,
  "composer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary composer for the album */,
  "is_remastered" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is a remastered version */,
  "remaster_date" TEXT /* Date of the remastering, if applicable */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album contains explicit content */,
  "album_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_composer_id FOREIGN KEY ("composer_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_lyricist_id FOREIGN KEY ("lyricist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre associated with the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "artist_website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "is_band" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the artist is a band */,
  "band_members" TEXT /* JSON array of band members' names */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Physical, Digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sales channel */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of the sales channel (e.g., Digital, Physical) */,
  "channel_url" TEXT /* URL of the sales channel's website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the channel is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album associated with the sales */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales channel used */,
  "sales_millions" REAL /* Total sales in millions for the specified channel */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "sales_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the album in the sales chart for the specified channel */,
  "sales_trend" TEXT /* Indicator of the sales trend (e.g., Increasing, Decreasing, Stable) */,
  "sales_region" TEXT /* Region where the sales data is recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "playlist_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_type" TEXT /* Type of the playlist (e.g., Personal, Shared, Collaborative) */,
  "privacy_setting" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_albums" (
  "playlist_album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album included in the playlist */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the album in the playlist */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album is featured in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_albums_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_albums_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "rating_description" TEXT /* A brief description or comment accompanying the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre, if applicable (for sub-genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "user_website" TEXT /* URL of the user's personal website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "is_music_professional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is a professional in the music industry */,
  "favorite_genres" TEXT /* JSON array of the user's favorite genres */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
